source.name: Lab 6.2: Verify Domain and Training
source.instructions:
To pass this assessment, all of the following must be true:

• Checks 1–6 (Lab 4.1): domain/basics.yml exists; actions: section present; action_bank_hours and action_holiday_hours registered under actions:; valid YAML list syntax; file is valid YAML.
• Check 7 (Lab 6.2): A trained model file (.tar.gz) exists in level2/models/ (you must run 'python -m rasa train' from level2 with venv active).
source.guidance: The grader runs Lab 4.1 checks (both actions in domain) then verifies a model file exists in level2/models/. If domain fails, fix domain and re-run. If Check 7 fails, run 'cd level2' and 'python -m rasa train' from project root with venv active.
